no: Adds shamanic improvements including new shaman kits, a stronghold, an undead NPC companion named Will, and additional items and enemies.

passive.desc: +2 bonus to saving throws vs. death
-2 penalty to saving throws vs. spells
Shamanic Dance summons undead spirits instead of nature spirits: Necrotic Fireflies (lv1), Will-o'-Wisps (lv6), Spectres (lv12), Greater Will-o'-Wisps (lv18)

activated.effects: Conjures bone dagger: 2d4+2, chance to poison or drain levels.
Shapeshift: high STR/resistances, can still dance and cast at reduced speed. 2 min.

restrictions.items: Weapons: daggers, spears, axes, quarterstaves, shortbows only. Detect Illusions starts at 10% (vs 20%).

spellRestrictions.note: Gains necromancy spells as divine: Larloch Minor Drain (lv3), Horror (lv5), Vampiric Touch (lv7), Animate Dead (lv9), Exploding Skull (lv11), Death Spell (lv13).

passive.desc: +1 CHA, +2 AC and saves vs. humanoids (lv9)

activated.effects: Communicates with location ghosts for random item rewards.
15' radius, +2 AC/saves vs undead, pushes away hostile undead (2d4 crushing).

restrictions.items: Weapons: daggers, quarterstaves, darts, shortbows only.

spellRestrictions.note: Standard shaman spellcasting + urban-specific innates (Know Alignment, Oracle, etc.)

new: Shaman wielding will-o-wisp-like spirit lights. Illumination and spirit fire magic.
Urban shaman serving as intermediary between townsfolk and spirits.

sum: Adds shamanic improvements including new shaman kits, a stronghold, an undead NPC companion named Will, and additional items and enemies.

co.n: Will NPC, shaman stronghold and new shaman kit for BG2EE
co.tp2n: Will NPC, shaman stronghold and new shaman kit for BG2EE
co.no: Bundles Will NPC (undead witchlight shaman), shaman stronghold (after Shade Lord quest), and Witchlight Shaman kit. Installs the kit via ADD_KIT. INSTALLED WITH WARNINGS: 'SPWI904.spl is missing, aborting struct_copy' — Meteor Swarm spell file missing from override (possibly consumed by SR). One shapeshift struct_copy skipped. Also 'no effects altered on SPPR120.spl' in shapeshift changes. 'Add 9 new arcane spells' and 'Add 6 divine spells' also install with warnings. All non-fatal.

co.n: Change shaman .tlk string to remove "Ineligible for any stronghold" line
co.no: Simple string edit removing "Ineligible for any stronghold" from shaman class description. Only useful with the stronghold from cn:0.
co.tp2n: Change shaman .tlk string to remove "Ineligible for any stronghold" line

co.no: Standalone Witchlight Shaman kit without the NPC or stronghold. SKIPPED by WeiDU if cn:0 is installed ('Will NPC is already installed') — cn:0 already includes this kit. Only use without cn:0.
Standalone Town Medium shaman kit by morpheus562 and Lava. No dependencies. Also included in Bethany IWDEE NPC — cannot install both. Works on BGEE/BG2EE/IWDEE/EET.

co.n: New items for shamans and undead NPCs
co.no: Adds new shamanic items and items for undead NPCs (Will, Hexxat, etc.). Fully standalone — does not require cn:0.
co.tp2n: New items for shamans and undead NPCs

co.n: Optional: Drider, Dark Treant, Will-o'- wisp Enemies
co.tp2n: Optional: Drider, Dark Treant, Will-o'-wisp Enemies
co.no: Adds Driders, Dark Treants, and hostile Will-o-wisps to existing BG2/IWDEE areas. Fully standalone — does not require cn:0.

co.n: [CHEAT] Enable shaman stronghold for all classes
co.tp2n: [CHEAT] Enable shaman stronghold for all classes
co.no: Cheat: allows non-shaman PCs to access the shaman stronghold.
